funFacts: The Lobster on Sandy Seabed does not age in the same way as humans, maintaining muscle strength and reproductive capability throughout its long life.
The Lobster on Sandy Seabed sheds its hard exoskeleton (molts) up to 25 times in its first five years of growth.
